seoTitle: Dallas ISD Calendar 2025-2026: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Dallas ISD 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 12 first day, May 27 last day, holidays, breaks, intersession dates, PDF and ICS.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Dallas Independent School District have a fall break in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Dallas Independent School District has a fall break running from Oct 9, 2025 to Oct 10, 2025, a total of 2 days.

calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Dallas Independent School District in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Dallas Independent School District is Tuesday, August 12, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2025-2026 for Dallas Independent School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Dallas Independent School District runs Mar 16, 2026–Mar 20, 2026, 5 days.

yearNumbers.label: Fall Break
yearNumbers.detail: Oct 9–10 fall break is a Dallas ISD-specific feature — most Texas districts don't schedule a mid-fall closure this short.

calendarNotes: Dallas ISD begins the 2025–2026 school year on August 12, 2025. Spring Break runs March 16–20, 2026. The school year ends May 27, 2026.
